title: eriocaulon sexangulare var. australe
intro: Eriocaulon sexangulare var. australe, commonly known as the Australian pipe orchid, is a plant species belonging to the Eriocaulaceae family. Traditionally used in folk medicine, its medicinal properties include anti-inflammatory, antimicrobial, and antioxidant properties. The plant is believed to have health benefits such as reducing fever, alleviating respiratory issues, and providing relief from pain. In herbal preparations, the plant is often used to make infusions, decoctions, and tinctures, which can be consumed to harness its medicinal properties.
